mission: Launch platform research for Command Centre (autonomous AI agent OS)

platforms.name: Product Hunt
platforms.category: Launch feed — short spike, high visibility

audience.demographic: Tech-savvy early adopters, founders, investors — ~20% US-based

steps: Create a maker account and complete profile
Add product with tagline, description, screenshots, demo link
Choose a launch date (schedule in advance recommended)
Rally community support for launch day upvotes
Engage with comments throughout the day
submission_process.review_time: Instant — self-serve submission, goes live at midnight PT on launch day

cost.free_tier: Yes — submit, launch, and engage at no cost

platforms.expected_results: Top 5 finish → ~1,500+ unique visitors on launch day; potential press pickup
platforms.fit_for_command_centre: HIGH — AI Agents is an active category with strong discovery. Best single-day visibility spike.

platforms.name: BetaList

audience.demographic: Early adopters actively seeking beta products to test

steps: Prepare materials: product description, screenshots, founder story
Create account and complete founder profile
Wait for editorial review and approval

cost.free_tier: Yes — standard submission, longer review queue

platforms.expected_results: 50–500 signups typical; best used 2–3 weeks before main launch to validate messaging
platforms.fit_for_command_centre: HIGH — ideal pre-launch play. Submit before Product Hunt launch to build early beta user base and refine positioning.

platforms.name: SaaSHub

audience.demographic: SaaS buyers, developers, and teams comparing software alternatives

steps: Provide product name, description, category, pricing, website URL
Add screenshots, demo video, customer reviews
Once approved, listing is live with SEO backlink

cost.free_tier: Yes — full product listing at no cost

platforms.expected_results: Steady organic discovery via search and 'alternatives to X' comparisons; strong SEO backlink value
platforms.fit_for_command_centre: MEDIUM-HIGH — positions Command Centre in 'alternatives to' searches against competitors. Long-tail traffic that compounds over time.

recommended_launch_sequence: Week 1: Submit to BetaList (pre-launch validation, gather early signups)
Week 2: Submit to SaaSHub (build directory presence and SEO foundation)
Week 3: Launch on Product Hunt (maximum single-day spike with beta users primed to upvote)
